---
pagetitle: "Media Coverage | Jubayer Hossain"
title: "Media Coverage"
excerpt: "A list of selected talks of me"
toc-location: right
page-layout: full
---
Explore the latest media highlights featuring me and my research group. Discover insightful coverage of their impactful research.


- **08 February, 2024, 12:00 pm**. 
Title: *Parental lack of antibiotic knowledge imperils child health in Bangladesh: Study.*
Featured at [The Business Standard](https://www.tbsnews.net/).
[Link](https://www.tbsnews.net/bangladesh/health/parental-lack-antibiotic-knowledge-imperils-child-health-bangladesh-study-789250){.btn .btn-outline-primary .btn role="button" .btn-page-header .btn-xs}


- **27 May, 2024, 11:30 am**. 
Title: *What the rise in self-medication tells us about the country’s healthcare system.*
Featured at [The Business Standard](https://www.tbsnews.net/).
[Link](https://www.tbsnews.net/features/panorama/what-rise-self-medication-tells-us-about-countrys-healthcare-system-861146){.btn .btn-outline-primary .btn role="button" .btn-page-header .btn-xs}
